subcodes.first_line: O thou who art confessing the Oneness of God! Verily, I read thy letter and I besought God to cause thee to promulgate His divine Manifestation
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المقر بوحدانیه الله انی قرئت تحریرک و ابتهلت الی الله
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant, @call to action, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
